title: Aequatorium stellatopilosum
taxonomy: Aequatorium stellatopilosum is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Aequatorium which is a group of flowering plants native to South America. The species is a member of the tribe Senecioneae, a large group of daisy-like plants. Within the Asteraceae family, Aequatorium stellatopilosum is closely related to other plants in the same genus. The classification of Aequatorium stellatopilosum is further detailed by its kingdom and phylum as Plantae and Magnoliophyta respectively.
